# Toronto Restaurant Growth

> Restaurant marketing agency in Toronto. Social media, branding, and growth for restaurants.

## About

Toronto Restaurant Growth (TRG) is a marketing agency focused exclusively on restaurants in Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area. We help restaurants grow through social media content, influencer partnerships, brand development, and digital marketing. Part of the Forge agency network.

## Services

- Social media content creation and management
- Restaurant branding and identity
- Influencer and creator partnerships
- Content strategy for food and beverage
- Online reputation management
- Digital marketing campaigns

## Service Area

Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area, Ontario, Canada, including Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Oakville, Hamilton, and surrounding cities.

## Contact

- Website: https://torontorestaurantgrowth.ca

## Key Facts

- Restaurant-focused marketing agency
- Part of the Forge agency network
- Serving Toronto and GTA restaurants
- Content, branding, and growth services
